column1: # OEIS A369431 certified terms included in this raw GitHub-ready package.
#   oeis_known: term present in the local OEIS b-file source before this campaign.
#   canonical_run: term produced by the reviewed formula-free maximum-insertion production run.
# This table deliberately stops at n=22. The public b-file now continues through n=400
# with formula-derived terms documented separately; those rows are not canonical C runs.
# The label local_OEIS_snapshot_A369431 denotes the pre-campaign OEIS snapshot,
# not the later formula-extended public b-file.
